question: Can you find me the NYC elementary school in District 15 that ranked in the top 2 by performance category score over 3 school years starting from the school year with the highest suicide death rate between 2005 to 2010. For the neighborhood this elementary school is located in, which park is this neighborhood bounded by? Report the size of this park in acre. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest suicide death rate for all persons? (Filter STUB_NAME == "Total" and STUB_LABEL == "All persons"; average ESTIMATE by YEAR; select the maximum.)

2.fact: In 2010-11, the top 2 District 15 elementary schools by performance category score were: PS 321 William Penn (17.2) and PS 107 John W Kimball (15.8).
2.subquestion: Which NYC elementary schools in District 15 ranked in the top 2 by performance category score in the school year starting from <node_1 answer>?

4.fact: In 2012-13, the top 2 District 15 elementary schools by performance category score were: PS 321 William Penn (21.7) and PS 10 Magnet School of Math, Science, and Design Technology (19.3).
4.subquestion: Which NYC elementary schools in District 15 ranked in the top 2 by performance category score in 2012-13?

5.fact: PS 321 William Penn (DBN 15K321) is located at 180 7th Avenue in the Park Slope neighborhood of Brooklyn, NY 11215.
5.subquestion: What is the zip code where is <intersection of node_2, node_3, node_4: PS 321 William Penn> located?

6.fact: The neighborhood is named for its location on the western slope of Prospect Park.
6.subquestion: Which park is the neighborhood corresponding to the zip code in <node_5 answer> bounded by?

7.subquestion: What is the size of the park in <node_6 answer>? Answer in acre
